SEVERE WEATHER DESCHUTES COUNTY LA PINE WARMING SHELTER BY THE DOOR AT LA PINE OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offering overnight shelter throughout the winter season. 16430 3rd Street La Pine, OR 97739 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older and families with children. Well behaved pets are welcome; pets must remain with owner. Hours: 7 days per week 5pm-7am, Monday, December 1, 2025-Sunday, March 15, 2026 -Meals served from 6pm-7pm Email (541) 948-6649 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SEVERE WEATHER KLAMATH COUNTY KLAMATH FAMILY WARMING CENTER THRIVE CHURCH OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offering overnight shelter throughout the winter season. 235 S Laguna Street Gymnasium Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Adults 18 and older and families with children under the age of 18, service animals allowed Hours: 7 days per week 6pm-10am, Monday December 1, 2025-Sunday, March 15, 2026 Email (541) 887-4233 Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
